creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 156523
svn_diff_www_kannel_1.4.4

- Update to 1.4.4, set PORTEPOCH because version newest/stable is smalller
 - Add license (The_Kannel_Software_License)
 - Add user/group kannel (patch attached for UIDs and GIDs files)
 - Remove an outdated patch (patch-gwlib__gwthread-pthread.c)
 - Recreate a patch with make makepatch (patch-debian_kannel.conf)
 - Change pkg-description
 - Change pkg-plist
 - Add USES (gcc and bison)
 - split rc script (old rc was not working)
 - portlint compliant
 - poudriere testport logs for FreeBSD 10.1 amd64 and i386 attached.
